dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses context-dependent direction (long/short based on market direction). Entry requires: price above/below 40-period MA, ADX > 25 for trend confirmation, and sharp move detection (±3%) approximated using returns indicator over lookback window. Exit triggered when price closes beyond MA by margin. Trailing stop concept (2 ATR) incorporated into stop_loss_pct as 3.0%. Time-based exit (20 bars) mapped to hold_days_max.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses context-dependent direction (long/short based on market direction). Entry requires: price above/below 40-period MA, ADX > 25 for trend confirmation, and sharp move detection (±3%) approximated using returns indicator over lookback window. Exit triggered when price closes beyond MA by margin. Trailing stop concept (2 ATR) incorporated into stop_loss_pct as 3.0%. Time-based exit (20 bars) mapped to hold_days_max.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter positions in the direction of sharp market moves, because markets tend to move sharply when they move (trend-following principle based on momentum observation).
